节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: The resource is a mesh resource
Define scene resource extended by other 3d resource.

节点.属性类型: Record<string, number | Vec2 | Vec3 | Vec4 | Image>
注释信息: @type { Record<string, number | Vec2 | Vec3 | Vec4 | Image> }

节点.功能描述: Set shader inputs. Offers the same functionality for setting shader inputs as the property version, but with better performance.
注释信息: @param { Record<string, number | Vec2 | Vec3 | Vec4 | Image> } inputs - Inputs of the shader

parameters.类型: Record<string, number | Vec2 | Vec3 | Vec4 | Image>

节点.功能描述: The material type is a Shader.
The material is a physically-based metallic roughness material.
The material is an unlit material.
The material is an occlusion material
The enum of PBR material cull mode.
Render only edges(wireframe) of the polygon
Render only vertices of the polygon

Render sort Layer. Within a render slot a layer can define a sort layer order. There are 0-63 values available (0 first, 63 last). Default id value is 32. 1. Typical use case is to set render sort layer to objects which render with depth test without depth write. 2. Typical use case is to always render character and/or camera object first to cull large parts of the view. 3. Sort e.g. plane layers.
Sort layer used sorting submeshes in rendering in render slots. Valid values are 0 - 63.
Sort layer order to describe fine order within sort layer. Valid values are 0 - 255.
Defines if the material can receive shadows.
Control whether the blend is enabled
注释信息: @default undefined, which means that blending is disabled.

节点.功能描述: Texture to use. If undefined, factor defines the diffuse color.
Texture coefficient. Default is {1,1,1,1}, meaning no effect.
Base color factor of PBR material. Value of factor.xyzw defines rgba color.
Normal factor of PBR material. Value of factor.x defines normal scale.
Metallic roughness material parameters. Value of factor.y defines roughness, factor.z defines metallic and factor.a defines reflectance.
Ambient occlusion of PBR material. Value of factor.x defines ambient occlusion factor.
Clearcoat intensity. Value of factor.x defines clearcoat layer intensity.
Clearcoat roughness. Value of factor.y defines clearcoat layer roughness.
Clearcoat normal. Value of factor.xyz defines RGB clearcoat normal scale.
Sheen color of PBR material. Value of factor.xyz defines RGB sheen color, Value of factor.w defines sheen roughness.
Specular color of PBR material. Value of factor.xyz defines RGB specular color, Value of factor.w defines specular intensity.
Base color factor of unlit material. Value of factor.xyzw defines rgba color.
The name of the sub mesh.
The material of the sub mesh.
The axis aligned bounding box of the sub mesh.
Defines Morpher interface for specifying morph targets for Node's geometry.
The mesh instance owned by the mesh node
The sub meshes of the mesh.
The axis aligned bounding box of the mesh.
The material override sub mesh's material.
The mesh data description resource for the geometry node
Animation speed factor A negative value runs the animation in reverse using the given speed factor
The progress of the animation between 0~1.
Register a callback when animation finished.
注释信息: @param { Callback<void> } callback - the callback invoked when animation finished

parameters.说明: the callback invoked when animation finished

节点.功能描述: Register a callback when animation started.
注释信息: @param { Callback<void> } callback - the callback invoked when animation started

parameters.说明: the callback invoked when animation started

节点.功能描述: Seek the animation to the position.
注释信息: @param { number } position - the position seek between 0~1

节点.功能描述: Stop the animation and seek the position to the beginning.
Finish the animation and seek the position to the end.
The enum of environment background type.
The background type of the environment.
The indirect diffuse factor of the environment.
The indirect specular factor of the environment.
The environment map factor of the environment.
The environment image of the environment.
The radiance image of the environment.
The irradiance coefficients (array of nine Vec3).
Controls whether the effect is enabled or not.
The id of the effect. This is the id that was used to create the effect.
Get the value of a specific effect property.
注释信息: @param { string } propertyName - the name of specific property
@returns { Object | null | undefined } effect property value, return null if the "get" operation failed.
节点.return_description: effect property value, return null if the "get" operation failed.

节点.功能描述: Set the value of a specific effect property
注释信息: @param { string } propertyName - the name of specific property
@param { Object | undefined } value - property value to be set
@returns { boolean } return false if the "set" operation is failed
节点.return_description: return false if the "set" operation is failed
